'''Barse''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] attached to the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. As part of the [[Thrawn campaign]], Barse served under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Freja Covell]] and was tasked with securing [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Myrkr Base]], which had been abandoned in anticipation of the Imperial raid.

{{Char-stub}}
